const currentRecord=healthRecords[currentRecordIndex];// Check if we have all required fields

const smokingValue=parseInt(userData.smoking);// Process allergies: split by comma and convert to binary values

const commonAllergies=['pollen','dust','mold','pets','food'];const allergyValues=commonAllergies.map(allergy=>allergiesArr.some(item=>item.includes(allergy))?1:0);// Process medicine: determine medicine type and convert to binary

const processMedicineData=medicineText=>{// Initialize medicine categories with 0 (not using)
const medicineCategories={'inhaler':0,'steroid':0,'bronchodilator':0,'antibiotic':0,'antihistamine':0};if(!medicineText||medicineText==='None'){return Object.values(medicineCategories);}const medicineLower=medicineText.toLowerCase();// Check for different medicine types
if(medicineLower.includes('inhaler')||medicineLower.includes('ventolin')||medicineLower.includes('albuterol')){medicineCategories.inhaler=1;}if(medicineLower.includes('steroid')||medicineLower.includes('cortico')||medicineLower.includes('fluticasone')){medicineCategories.steroid=1;}if(medicineLower.includes('broncho')||medicineLower.includes('salbutamol')||medicineLower.includes('formoterol')){medicineCategories.bronchodilator=1;}if(medicineLower.includes('anti')&&medicineLower.includes('biotic')){medicineCategories.antibiotic=1;}if(medicineLower.includes('antihistamine')||medicineLower.includes('fexofenadine')||medicineLower.includes('cetirizine')){medicineCategories.antihistamine=1;}return Object.values(medicineCategories);};// Simple neural network prediction (simulated)
const neuralNetworkPredict=features=>{try{// Simple point-based system for demonstration
// Extract key values
const age=parseInt(features[0]||0);const gender=parseInt(features[1]||0);// 0 for male, 1 for female
const smoking=parseInt(features[2]||0);// 0 or 1
// Count allergies (indices 3-7)
let allergiesCount=0;for(let i=3;i<=7;i++){allergiesCount+=parseInt(features[i]||0);}// Get lung function values
const fev1=parseFloat(features[8]||0);const fvc=parseFloat(features[9]||0);const pef=parseInt(features[10]||0);// Get vital signs

riskScore-=medicationsCount*3;// Map to range 5-95%

}catch(error){console.error('Error in forecast handling:',error);setError('Error preparing forecast: '+error.message);setIsLoading(false);}};// Generate personalized recommendations based on risk level and health data
const generateRecommendations=(riskLevel,healthRecord)=>{const recommendations=[];// Get personalized recommendations based on user data and risk level

if(healthRecord.cough>0){recommendations.push('Track your cough symptoms to ensure they don\'t worsen');}if(parseFloat(healthRecord.FEV1)<3){recommendations.push('Your lung function is good, but continue regular measurements');}if(parseInt(healthRecord.pulse)>90){recommendations.push('Your heart rate is slightly elevated - consider consulting with your physician');}}else if(riskLevel==='moderate'){recommendations.push('Be vigilant about your symptoms');recommendations.push('Ensure your rescue inhaler is always accessible');// Add specific recommendations based on actual data
if(parseInt(healthRecord.cough)>=2){recommendations.push('Pay attention to your increased cough - contact your doctor if it worsens');}if(parseInt(healthRecord.nighttime_awakenings)>0){recommendations.push('Nighttime symptoms may indicate your asthma needs better control');}if(parseInt(healthRecord.breathlessness)>0||parseInt(healthRecord.wheezing)>0){recommendations.push('Your breathing symptoms suggest your treatment plan may need adjustment');}if(parseFloat(healthRecord.FEV1)<2.5||parseInt(healthRecord.PEF)<350){recommendations.push('Your lung function is below expected levels - consider consulting your doctor');}}else{// high risk
